{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322012137F734A1163F35300FC94F"}"},"total":4978},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581484441947587353","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好好，不靠华丽的辞藻文字清晰简洁，就是推剧情讲故事，二十多万字轮回加转场景，够水文写几十万字，几章就是一个副本。对话写的很好，角色鲜活，每次打出gg得时候不会让人沮丧，反而会感觉被对面阴笑了。
我感觉不算虐主，主角挂开得不小，随便拉个小技能时停一分钟，都够隔壁《时停起手》写整本书了。只是世界观里怪物才是主场，后面有反转不剧透了，书里小怪都带复活无敌即死，机制加数值，boss更是阴得没边，假装规则怪谈都整出来了，导致主角走几步就死。读档文，没出现死档不算失败，if线也都被主角修正了。
每次读档主角可以抽一个系统，遇到得怪也有规则怪谈，设定很新奇。
不知道后面会不会有主角获得大量积分或者加些常驻技能，因为主角所有系统都要花积分，有技能不敢用。都规则怪谈触发就死了，没必要压战力。","text_exts":[{"e":202,"s":198,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774113697300FC94F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227581484441947587353%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227552067105378536473%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765204334,"group_id":"7552067105378536473","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyW0bfSu2IRXKChcg7F0WnDYWN1/JoJ+3fMatdvaXejY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4336123915017048","user_name":"爱吃雪花啤酒鸭的罗香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4336123915017048","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7552067105378536473","book_info":{"abstract":"慈航大舞台，没挂你别来。
陈风穿越异世界，发现这里的Boss简直阴到没边。
“先去新手村发育一下。”
“哈！穿越者，逮到你了。”
“重生买个彩票。”
“哈！重生者，逮到你了。”
“好好好，这么阴是吧，那我也不必装什么正人君子了。”
陈风发现自己每死一次，都能刷新一个新系统。
系统的能力是有极限的，穿越者越是依赖系统，反而越是会陷入意想不到的困境，前功尽弃。。。。。。除非你不止一个系统。
“每日情报、打卡签到、模拟器、熟练度、聊天群、深蓝加点。。。。。。”
“他们的力量是靠修炼得来，软弱无力。”
“而我，可是靠系统加点，一步步努力上来的！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bd67557cdfc6e1ca2308bc540f6bb3f8","author":"巡山主神","author_id":"","book_id":"7552067105378536473","book_name":"boss阴到没边，我的系统也是","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"53.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7552070380790219289","read_count":"531090","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"636561"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"209","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,系统,穿越,灵异,规则怪谈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6123ee317c3b3edcec186a33b96c3bee~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779297697&x-signature=4iV2SRu63qQ9xV4ffENfrtExG%2Fk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98010781258","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"116"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322012137F734A1163F35300FC94F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":70,"forwarded_count":0,"l
